description: A system for users to rent cars. It handles user registration, car booking, and order management.

user_roles.description: Can register, log in, view car tariffs, book cars, and view their rental orders.
Can view car tariffs and register.

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allows new users to create an account in the system.
features.outputs: A new user account is created in the system.
business_rules: Phone number must be valid (uses validate_phone_number function).

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows existing users to log in to the system.
features.outputs: User is authenticated and redirected to the car rental page.
business_rules: Credentials must match a registered user.

features.name: User Logout
features.description: Allows logged-in users to log out of the system.
features.outputs: User session is terminated, and the user is redirected to the login page.

features.name: Car Rental Booking
features.description: Enables logged-in users to book a car for a specified period.
features.outputs: A car rental request is submitted and stored.
business_rules: Dates of issue and return must be valid.
Distance, driver's license number, credit card details, and mobile number are collected.

features.name: View My Orders
features.description: Allows logged-in users to view their past and current car rental orders.
features.outputs: A list of the user's rental orders is displayed.
business_rules: Only logged-in users can view their orders.

features.name: View Car Tariffs
features.description: Displays available car information and rental rates.
features.outputs: A list of cars with their details and rental information.

workflows.name: User Registration Workflow
postconditions: User is redirected to the login page (inferred from session.php redirect).

workflows.name: User Login Workflow
postconditions: User is redirected to the car rental page (rent.php).

workflows.name: Car Rental Booking Workflow

steps.action: Navigate to the car rental page
Select a car and enter booking details

postconditions: Rental request is saved in the 'request' table.
User is redirected to the car rental page (rent.php).

workflows.name: Logout Workflow
postconditions: User is redirected to the login page.
